titleStmt.title: SII 30.95: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 95. (A.R. No. 172 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple-on the same walls Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: Year 7, day 229: 1019 A.D.

summary.p: It records the detailed arrangements made by the sabhā of Madhurāntakachchaturvēdimaṅgalam for rearing a flower garden in the name of Rajēndrasōḻaṉ, situated to the south of the temple of Mahāvishṇu out of the taxes collected from Kūḍalūr. The apportionment of allotted paddy is stated. Subrahmaṇya brahmapriyaṉ figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭaṉtaiyum por ceyappāvaiyum cirttaṉicce
lviyum taṉperunteviyarākki Iṉpuṟa neṭitiyal Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉa velip pa
(ṭa)ṭar vanavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟkarumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakka
mum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉa
var vaitta cun=tara muṭiyu min=tiranāramu teṇṭicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷar muṟaimai
yiṟ cūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velaiyun tolperuṅkā
vaṟ palpaḻantivuñ ceruviṟ cinavil Irupattoru kālaraicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntimattiy
varaṇkaruti Iruttiya cempoṟ tiruttakumuṭiyu māpperun=taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesarivanmarāṉa śrī
rājentracoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 7vatu nāḷ 2 100 2 10 9 ṉāl jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu taniyūr śrīma
turān=takaccaturveti maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Eḻuttu nammur vaṭapiṭākait tirumukkūṭal ma
haāviṣṇukkaḷuṭaiya śrīkoyiliṉ teṟkil kaṇṇaṉ Eṭṭup paṭṭiyāna śrīrājentracoḻaṉeṉṉum tiru
nan=tavāṉattukkuk kiḻellai tiruveṅkaṭacceri niṉṟun=teṟkunokkik kūṭalūr nattattukke poṉavaḻikku meṟkun=te
ṉellai Arumpuliyūr Erikkup pāyn=ta pakaṭikkālukku vaṭakkum melellai ceyāṟṟiṉ kiḻaip pirakkettameṉ
ṉuñceṟuvukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai śrīkoyilukkut teṟkum vaṭavellai tiruveṅkaṭaccerikkut teṟkum Ā
ka Innāṉkellaiyuḷḷumuṭpaṭṭa nilattuk kamukaṉ toṭṭamāna Eḻupāṭakamum Uḻappikka vaicca nivan=tamāva
tu kūṭalūr Ūrārai nāṅkoḷḷakkaṭava piṭākai Iṟaikkāka Ivvūrili devarkku muṉpu śilālekhaippaṭi Iṟai
viḻun=tapāṭakamum mucuguntiśvaramuṭaiyār pāṭakam Eṭṭum nikki nirpūci nelviḷaiyum pāṭakaṅkaḷāl pāṭaka
m Oṉṟiṉukku maturān=takaṉ marakkālāl nellukkalane tūṇip patakkāka Uḷḷa pāṭakaṅkaḷāl van=ta ne
lluk kūṭalūr Ūrār pakkal Iśrīkoyilil vaikhānasare kaiyuṟṟut tāṅkaḷe nicatam Eṭṭāṭpaṭṭu E
ttam Eṭukkavuṅ kallavum veliyiṭavu maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Uḻappum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum Uḻappippārkaḷā
kavu mivvāḷ Eṭṭukkum perāl nicata nelluk kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyāka Inellileyaṭṭi Uḻappippārkaḷākavu mivvai
khānasare kalaṅkoḷḷik kūṭaiyāl Eḻāyirak kūṭai Eruppātti vāṅki Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Aṭṭuvārkaḷākavum vaik
kol kalanelliṉ pārañcuruṅkāme 2 100 3 kaṭṭu Ivvūrp pulaṅkaḷiluṅ kollaikaḷiluṅ kaṭṭit toṭṭattukku Āṭṭāṇṭu to
ṟum Iṭṭuk koḷvārkaḷākavu mivvūr vaikkol kaccippeṭṭukkum Ūrkku maṟṟum veṇṭum viniyokaṅkaḷukkum vi
niyokikkap peṟātomākavum Ittoṭṭattil kiḻpokañ ceyaveṇṭuvaṉa Itdevar kanmikaḷe Ivvuḻakkiṟ
vaikhānasarkke Aṭaiviṭṭu Aṭaippaṭi Uṇpārkaḷākavum Ikkūṭalūr Ūrār nirpūci nelviḷai pāṭakaṅkaḷāl va
n=tanellu Iv vaikhānasar vacame Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Ācantratāram Aḷantu kuṭupparākavum Ikkūṭalūr Ūrārai Ā
ḷum Amañciyum veṭṭiyuñ cevakamum Uḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa piṭākai Iṟaikkoṭṭavuṅ koḷḷavum peṟā
tomākavu maṟṟumellā sarvvaparihāramum peṟuvārkaḷāvum Itaṟ tiṟampiṟ paṇittapaṇi sahākiruti Allātatākavu mikkūṭalūr melai Ērinir varicaiyiṭṭu nir pāyccuṅ kālattu
Ittirunan=tavāṉattukku veṇṭu nirpāycciye niṉṟa bhūmikaḷukku varicaiyiṭṭu nirpāyccuvārkaḷākavum mivvūrai yiṟaikoḷḷap paṇitta brāhmaṇaṉaiyu niyogameḻutina kaṇakkaṉaiyum sabhai
yom niyogattāle śraddhāman=tare nūṟṟukkaḻañcu poṉ maṉṟap peṟuvārkaḷāka Ipparicu vyavastai ceytu paṇittu śilālekai ceyvittom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom paṇiyāl cuppi
ramaṇiyaṉ bra(ra)mmapiriyaṉneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
